title: AI Retro Arcade
description: Turns a photo into vibrant 1980s arcade cabinet artwork.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into vibrant 1980s arcade cabinet key art. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity cues, pose, camera angle, framing, main composition, and scene context. Use crisp pixel-informed shapes combined with hand-painted arcade illustration, electric cyan, magenta, violet, and amber highlights, dramatic action lighting, glowing grid motifs, starbursts, subtle CRT scanlines, and energetic retro-futuristic composition. Keep people recognizable and avoid adding game interface elements or words. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, game title, letters, numbers, score, HUD, user interface, logos, trademarks, watermarks, signatures, extra people, missing people, changed identity, distorted faces, malformed hands, extra fingers, duplicate limbs, duplicate face, modern photorealistic game render, flat lighting, muddy colors, blurry, low quality, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. purple arcade cabinet palette, stronger CRT scanlines...
